title: Cuneiform Tablet #0744: Hellenistic Royal Inscription
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Hellenistic period — a royal inscription document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Hellenistic period — a royal inscription document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Hellenistic period. Royal Inscription document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records royal inscription matters typical of Hellenistic period administrative or literary practice.
